// ========== ODOO CONFIGURATION - UPDATE THESE ==========
const ODOO_URL = 'https://boards.mcmillan.solutions'; // Your Odoo URL (without trailing slash)
const ODOO_DB = 'boards_init'; // Your database name
const ODOO_USERNAME = 'aashishanilmcmillan@gmail.com'; // Your Odoo login email
const ODOO_PASSWORD = '123'; // Your Odoo password
// =======================================================

function createEODReportDraft() {
  // Get today's date
  var today = new Date();
  var dateString = Utilities.formatDate(today, Session.getScriptTimeZone(), "MM/dd/yyyy");
  
  // Define the subject
  var subject = "EOD Report (" + dateString + ") - Aashish Anil - DevOps - IT";
  
  // Get tasks from Odoo with time logged today
  var tasksWithTime = getOdooTasksWithTimeToday();
  
  // Build completed tasks list
  var completedTasksHtml = "";
  if (tasksWithTime && tasksWithTime.length > 0) {
    tasksWithTime.forEach(function(item) {
      var projectName = item.project_name || 'No Project';
      var taskName = item.task_name || 'No Task';
      var timeSpent = item.time_spent || 0;
      
      // Format time (convert decimal hours to hours:minutes)
      var hours = Math.floor(timeSpent);
      var minutes = Math.round((timeSpent - hours) * 60);
      var timeFormatted = hours + ":" + (minutes < 10 ? "0" + minutes : minutes);
      
      completedTasksHtml += "<li>" + taskName + " " + timeFormatted + "</li>";
    });
  } else {
    // Fallback if no tasks found or Odoo connection fails
    completedTasksHtml = "<li>MCM - Internal DevOps support 3:53</li>";
  }
  
  // Define the body with HTML for bullet points
  var body = "Hi,<br><br>" +
             "The following is my EOD report for today.<br><br>" +
             "The following are my completed tasks:<br>" +
             "<ul>" +
             completedTasksHtml +
             "</ul><br>" +
             "The following are my to-dos for tomorrow:<br><br>" +
             "Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns.<br>";
  
  // Define the recipient
  var to = "shaheer@mcmillanglobal.com, hr@mcmwg.com";
  
  // Create the draft email with HTML body
  GmailApp.createDraft(to, subject, "", { htmlBody: body });
  
  Logger.log("EOD Report draft created successfully!");
}

// ========== ODOO INTEGRATION FUNCTIONS ==========

function authenticateOdoo() {
  try {
    const url = ODOO_URL + '/jsonrpc';
    
    const payload = {
      jsonrpc: '2.0',
      method: 'call',
      params: {
        service: 'common',
        method: 'authenticate',
        args: [ODOO_DB, ODOO_USERNAME, ODOO_PASSWORD, {}]
      },
      id: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000)
    };
    
    const options = {
      method: 'post',
      contentType: 'application/json',
      payload: JSON.stringify(payload),
      muteHttpExceptions: true
    };
    
    const response = UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);
    const result = JSON.parse(response.getContentText());
    
    if (result.result) {
      Logger.log('Odoo authentication successful');
      return result.result;
    } else {
      Logger.log('Odoo authentication failed: ' + response.getContentText());
      return null;
    }
  } catch (error) {
    Logger.log('Error authenticating with Odoo: ' + error.toString());
    return null;
  }
}



function getOdooTasksWithTimeToday() {
  try {
    const uid = authenticateOdoo();
    
    if (!uid) {
      Logger.log('Cannot fetch tasks - authentication failed');
      return null;
    }
    
    const url = ODOO_URL + '/jsonrpc';
    
    // Get today's date
    const today = new Date();
    const todayStart = Utilities.formatDate(today, Session.getScriptTimeZone(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
    
    // First, get timesheet entries for today
    const payload = {
      jsonrpc: '2.0',
      method: 'call',
      params: {
        service: 'object',
        method: 'execute_kw',
        args: [
          ODOO_DB,
          uid,
          ODOO_PASSWORD,
          'account.analytic.line', // Timesheet model in Odoo
          'search_read',
          [
            [
              ['user_id', '=', uid], // Your timesheets
              ['date', '=', todayStart], // Today's date
              ['project_id', '!=', false] // Has a project (filters out non-project timesheets)
            ]
          ],
          {
            fields: ['name', 'task_id', 'project_id', 'unit_amount'],
            limit: 100,
            order: 'id desc'
          }
        ]
      },
      id: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000000)
    };
    
    const options = {
      method: 'post',
      contentType: 'application/json',
      payload: JSON.stringify(payload),
      muteHttpExceptions: true
    };
    
    const response = UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);
    const result = JSON.parse(response.getContentText());
    
    if (result.result && result.result.length > 0) {
      Logger.log('Found ' + result.result.length + ' timesheet entries from Odoo');
      
      // Group by task and sum hours
      var taskMap = {};
      
      result.result.forEach(function(entry) {
        var taskId = entry.task_id ? entry.task_id[0] : 'no_task';
        var taskName = entry.task_id ? entry.task_id[1] : entry.name;
        var projectName = entry.project_id ? entry.project_id[1] : 'No Project';
        var hours = entry.unit_amount || 0;
        
        var key = taskId + '_' + projectName;
        
        if (taskMap[key]) {
          taskMap[key].time_spent += hours;
        } else {
          taskMap[key] = {
            task_name: taskName,
            project_name: projectName,
            time_spent: hours
          };
        }
      });
      
      // Convert map to array
      var tasksArray = [];
      for (var key in taskMap) {
        tasksArray.push(taskMap[key]);
      }
      
      Logger.log('Grouped into ' + tasksArray.length + ' unique tasks');
      return tasksArray;
      
    } else {
      Logger.log('No timesheet entries found for today');
      return null;
    }
  } catch (error) {
    Logger.log('Error fetching timesheets from Odoo: ' + error.toString());
    return null;
  }
}

function doGet() {
  createEODReportDraft();
  
  // Return a nice confirmation message
  var html = '<html><body style="font-family: Arial; padding: 40px; text-align: center;">' +
             '<h2 style="color: #4CAF50;">✅ Success!</h2>' +
             '<p>Your EOD Report draft has been created.</p>' +
             '<p>Check your Gmail drafts.</p>' +
             '<br><br>' +
             '<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/#drafts" style="background-color: #4CAF50; color: white; padding: 10px 20px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 5px;">Open Gmail Drafts</a>' +
             '</body></html>';
  
  return HtmlService.createHtmlOutput(html);
}
